authority: repository source, documentation, policy, local fixture, test, evidence, Git commit, main push, and remote-ref readback only; no provider, deployment, environment-value, secret, message, approval-resume, delivery, rollback, or Production readback or mutation

impactLedger.result: Exactly ten consumer-visible journeys have stable identity, starting state, oracle, side effects, invariants, evidence, non-claims, command or runbook owner, environment, readback boundary, and honest proved/partial/deferred/approval_gated scope.

impactLedger.surface: Proof packets, retained evidence, and lifecycle
impactLedger.result: Effect and interoperable schemas enforce candidate identity, authority, environment, journey results, bounded detail roots and digests, readback/consequence truth, rollback, status/outcome/lifecycle compatibility, supersession, limitations, and non-claims.

The verification gate prints bounded invariant, target, repair, postcondition, and omitted-detail routing while retaining a structured report; invalid or unavailable evidence fails without raw cause, secret, body, home path, or unbounded log output.

Effect FileSystem, Config, Schema, HTTP, and bounded-stream operations produce a typed receipt; request-attempt identity is durable, rerun_avoided preserves prior detail, output_closed writes a linked sidecar, interruption exits nonzero, and no body or secret is retained.

Runtime-aligned Upstash aliases, bounded mode-0600 metadata input, strict Effect Schema decoding, integrity-checked detail, staged rejection, and true 0/1/2 exit receipts prove local supplied-metadata validation only and explicitly grant no Production authority.

impactLedger.surface: Docs, READMEs, repository skill, SPEC, and active plan
impactLedger.result: Current routes name the verification/evidence owners, maintenance triggers, proof limits, HGI-309 provider boundary, executable gates, and local/Preview/Production distinctions.

No provider readback or mutation occurred. HGI-309 retains external qualification; unavailable readback remains inconclusive and no local packet claims deployment, delivery, resume, recovery, or health.

checks.result: check:verification passed exactly ten journeys; 59 tooling tests passed, including strict schema, lifecycle, authority, readback, digest, bounded-output, interruption, and tamper cases.

Ten Preview cases and 16 production-preflight cases passed, including immutable rerun detail, linked pipe-close sidecar, interruption, input bounds, permissions, aliases, classification, exit code, and integrity readback.

Three fresh Terra audits found and caused correction of destructive retained-detail handling, terminology, evidence routing, and stale hashes; final recheck recomputed all 15 source hashes and passed all eight adversarial scenarios.

Effect setup, boundaries, docs, skills, authority, verification, 59 tooling tests, type-aware Ultracite, lint fixture, Knip, five typechecks, and 262 app/package tests passed with the documented public synthetic Executor endpoint and no provider call.

limitations: Repository source, local loopback HTTP, synthetic metadata, local tests, and fresh-context acceptance do not prove Vercel, Executor, Sendblue, Upstash, AI Gateway, Codex, deployed Eve, delivery, approval, rollback, or Production actuality.
Gateway session creation and interrupted-stream recovery remain deferred; other external journeys retain their partial or approval_gated scope until HGI-309 qualification.
The public synthetic Executor URL satisfies build-time discovery only; no API key or provider request was used.
nonClaims: No provider, environment value, ignored operational artifact, credential, secret, deployment, alias, webhook, message, delivery, approval resume, rollback, recovery, or Production system was read or changed.
A local test, receipt schema, passed preflight, command owner, model output, or unavailable readback is not external proof or operation authority.
rollback: Revert the ten-journey owner, proof/evidence contracts, verification policy/tests, Preview and production receipt producers/tests/runbooks, current routes/SPEC/plan/skill profile, and HGI-305 evidence together while preserving accepted HGI-300 through HGI-304, HGI-308, and HGI-310 evidence.
